name: URLBurst
description: Premium bulk URL opener and manager for SEO professionals, developers, and researchers.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none';
